title: HasChanged() not reflected after programmatic pflag.Set()
body: pflagValue.HasChanged() wraps flag.Changed from pflag, but when a flag is set programmatically via fs.Set(name, value) instead of from the command line, BindPFlag still reports the default rather than the overridden value in some of our tests.

title: Remote watch goroutine leaks when quit channel fires
body: WatchChannel spawns a goroutine that forwards crypt.Response to a viper.RemoteResponse channel, but on the quit path it's not obvious the goroutine actually exits — under repeated Watch/quit cycles our goroutine count keeps climbing.

title: .env codec does not support multi-line quoted values
body: internal/encoding/dotenv/codec.go seems to parse each line independently, so a KEY="line one\nline two" style multi-line value in a .env file gets truncated at the first line break instead of being treated as one value.

title: Clarify precedence between remote key/value store and config file in docs
body: The precedence comment at the top of viper.go lists key/value store above defaults but below env, however it's ambiguous whether an unwatched remote provider value overrides a locally loaded config file after AddRemoteProvider + ReadRemoteConfig are both called. Please clarify with an example.

title: YAML codec fails on top-level list documents
body: Calling ReadConfig on a YAML file whose top-level value is a list (not a map) errors out in internal/encoding/yaml/codec.go instead of being rejected with a clear "config must be a mapping" message.
